title: Salty Flaky Irish Cherry Crumble
description: A kid-friendly Irish dish featuring pressure-cooked dried cherries with a flaky crust made from almond meal, perfect for breakfast or dessert.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of dried sour cherries
ingredients.notes: ensure they are not too wet

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup almond meal
ingredients.notes: commercially available at grocery stores or make your own using almonds and a food processor

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup olive oil
ingredients.notes: ensure it is at room temperature

instructions: Pressure-cook the dried cherries with 2 cups of water and a pinch of salt for 3 minutes on high pressure. Let them cool before using.
Preheat your oven to 350°F (180°C). Mix the almond meal, sugar, and olive oil together in a large bowl until smooth and creamy.
Press the mixture into an 8-inch square baking dish lined with parchment paper for easy removal. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
After removing from oven, spread the cooled cherry filling over the crust evenly. Let it cool completely before serving.
